title: Skill Quality Assessment
description: Structured feedback on skill effectiveness during task execution

skill.description: Information about the skill being assessed

name.description: Name of the skill being assessed (e.g., 'constraint-programming')

version.description: Version of the skill being assessed, if present in skill metadata (e.g., '1.0.0')

agent.description: Information about the agent that performed the task

runtime.description: Runtime environment where agent executed (e.g., 'VSCode', 'Cursor IDE', 'CLI', 'GitHub Copilot Chat', 'Continue.dev')

models.description: LLM model(s) used to complete task, in order of primary to supporting models

task.description: Information about the task that was completed using the skill

description.description: Brief description of task performed (e.g., 'Implement EnforceMaximumWeeklyHours constraint')

completion.description: Whether the task was fully completed

autonomy.description: Assessment of how independently the agent completed the task

level.description: Autonomy level: fully=0 interventions, mostly=1-2, semi=3-5, low=6+, failed=unable to proceed

total_interventions.description: Total number of human interventions required to complete task

preserve.description: Content that worked exceptionally well and should not be changed

item.description: What to preserve (e.g., 'Quick start template in SKILL.md')

why.description: Why this was effective (e.g., 'Used as-is, saved setup time')

id.description: Unique identifier for this feedback item (e.g., 'f1', 'f2')

area.description: Category of the feedback: accuracy=wrong info, missing_context=gaps in knowledge, non_existent=references to things that don't exist, broken_example=code that doesn't work, navigation=hard to find info, verbosity=too wordy, examples=example issues, guidance=workflow gaps, structure=organization problems

severity.description: Severity: critical=broken code/blocks progress, high=missing essential context, medium=inefficient/confusing, low=nice-to-have

action.description: Type of action needed: fix=correct error, replace=substitute content, remove=delete, add=insert new, clarify=make clearer, condense=reduce verbosity, expand=add detail, restructure=reorganize, reword=rephrase, move=relocate, merge=combine, split=separate

summary.description: One-sentence summary of the issue (e.g., 'Duration uses wrong method name')

description.description: Detailed description with full context (e.g., 'Skill references greaterThan() but Duration class only has moreThan()')

rationale.description: Why this matters and what impact it has (e.g., 'Code breaks immediately when used, test fails')

suggestions.description: One or more suggestions for how to address the issue

required_intervention.description: Whether this issue required human intervention to resolve
